notes: Each eval requires a fresh test repo created by setup-test-repo.sh. The sub-agent must cd into the test repo before starting. The jit binary is at /home/vkaskivuo/.cargo/bin/jit. The skill files are at /home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/skills/project-lead/. MCP server should be disabled to avoid contaminating production .jit. The composed jit skills are at /home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/skills/jit-manage/, jit-breakdown/, jit-parallel/.

evals.name: sw-epic-with-children
evals.prompt: You are a project lead. Your working directory is a test project at {REPO_PATH}. The jit binary is at /home/vkaskivuo/.cargo/bin/jit. Read the project-lead skill at /home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/skills/project-lead/SKILL.md and follow it to lead the epic in this repo to completion. The epic ID will be output by the setup script. The composed skills (jit-manage, jit-breakdown, jit-parallel) are at /home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/skills/. Drive this epic autonomously — implement the child tasks, pass gates, complete the epic.
evals.expected_output: Epic and all child issues transitioned to done. src/strings.py contains slugify and truncate functions. tests/test_strings.py contains passing tests. All gates passed. Completion report produced.

evals.name: sw-epic-needs-breakdown
evals.prompt: You are a project lead. Your working directory is a test project at {REPO_PATH}. The jit binary is at /home/vkaskivuo/.cargo/bin/jit. Read the project-lead skill at /home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/skills/project-lead/SKILL.md and follow it to lead the epic in this repo to completion. The epic has a design doc but no children — you must break it down first, then dispatch and complete. The composed skills are at /home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/skills/.
evals.expected_output: Epic broken down into child tasks covering all 4 arithmetic endpoints. Children created with proper DAG wiring. Implementation completed. All gates passed. Epic transitioned to done. Completion report produced.

evals.name: content-project-epic
evals.prompt: You are a project lead. Your working directory is a test project at {REPO_PATH}. The jit binary is at /home/vkaskivuo/.cargo/bin/jit. Read the project-lead skill at /home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/skills/project-lead/SKILL.md and follow it to lead the documentation epic in this repo to completion. This is a content project with no code — the skill should handle it without assuming software conventions. The composed skills are at /home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/skills/.
evals.expected_output: Epic broken down into doc tasks. Tutorial, how-to guide, and reference page created in correct directories. All follow Diataxis structure and project conventions. docs/index.md updated. Content-review gate passed. Epic done. No software-specific commands attempted.
